rationale: Both candidates correctly diagnose the None+1 TypeError as a base-vs-Instruct tokenizer mismatch triggered by the two-stage MoE config, cite the same hunyuan_image3.py lines, confirm the DiT-config workaround, and correctly close pending a follow-up issue per Gaohan123 — matching the thread closely. Y more precisely reproduces the thread's actual causal argument (PR #2713 removing the `modes` field that used to filter out the AR stage) and its proposed fix is a literal fail-fast guard, matching exactly what akshatvishu/FayeSpica agreed to (item 2), whereas X's code fix instead makes the ratio-slice silently tolerant/empty, which subtly diverges from the 'fail fast with a clean error' ask even though X mentions that idea separately in prose. X adds some unverifiable embellishment (exact YAML header text, AR→DiT KV-reuse claims, class name HunyuanImage3ForCausalLM vs Y's ForConditionalGeneration) that isn't backed by the given thread/issue text, slightly weakening its grounding relative to Y's tighter adherence to stated facts.
